name: hookherald
description: Watcher and webhook relay for Claude Code — push script output and HTTP events into running sessions

scripts.test: npx tsx --test-force-exit --test tests/observability.test.ts && npx tsx --test-force-exit --test tests/channel.test.ts && npx tsx --test-force-exit --test tests/router.test.ts && npx tsx --test-force-exit --test tests/cli.test.ts
